meaning: n.一种用三十二张牌三人玩的纸牌游戏
examples: That was where our class got together, did our homework, played soccer and volleyball and skat, and flirted That where our class socialized, and it meant a lot to me to be part of it and to belong.
The vehicle, which belongs to Polish firm Skat, became wedged between a house and a churchyard wall in Brompton Regis on Thursday evening.
The vehicle, which belongs to Polish firm Skat, became stuck between two walls in Sanctuary Lane in Brompton Regis at about 19:00 GMT on Thursday.
